error_notWpCom: The URL is not wordpress.com, please check again.
error_noProfile: No profile, please add one at least
error_profileNotMatch: WordPress profile not match. Which one do you want to use?
command_publishWithDefault: Publish current note with default options
settings_urlDesc: Full path of installed WordPress, for example, https://example.com/wordpress
settings_apiTypeDesc: Select which API you want to use.
settings_apiTypeXmlRpcDesc: XML-RPC was enabled by default but some sites may disable it because of security problems.
settings_apiTypeRestMiniOrangeDesc: REST API was enabled by default in WordPress 4.7+. These APIs should be authenticated by extra plugin miniOrange which should be installed and enabled in WordPress server.
settings_apiTypeRestApplicationPasswords: REST API Authentication by application passwords
REST API was enabled by default in WordPress 4.7+ while application passwords was introduced in WordPress 5.6+.
settings_showRibbonIconDesc: If enabled, a button which opens publish panel will be added to the Obsidian sidebar.
settings_defaultPostStatusDesc: Post status which will be published to WordPress.
settings_rememberLastSelectedCategoriesD: Remember last selected post categories of this site.
settings_showWordPressEditPageModalDesc: Show open WordPress edit page confirmation when publish successfully
settings_wpComOAuth2RefreshTokenDesc: Click right button to validate or refresh wordpress.com OAuth2 token.
settings_defaultPostCommentDesc: Comment status which will be published to WordPress.
settings_MathJaxOutputTypeTeXDesc: Convert MathJax to TeX directly. WordPress needs install MathJax related plugin, such as simple-mathjax.
settings_MathJaxOutputTypeSVGDesc: Convert MathJax to SVG. Browser render SVG, no plugin needed for WordPress.
settings_commentConvertModeDesc: Select how to convert Obsidian notes comments.
settings_commentConvertModeIgnoreDesc: Just ignore all comments and convert comments to empty.
settings_commentConvertModeHTMLDesc: Convert Obsidian notes comments to HTML comments.
settings_enableHtmlDesc: Enable HTML tags in notes. This might cause XSS attack to your WordPress.
settings_replaceMediaLinksDesc: Replace media links to WordPress URLs after uploading.
loginModal_rememberUsernameDesc: If enabled, the WordPress username you typed will be saved in local data. This might be disclosure in synchronize services.
loginModal_rememberPasswordDesc: If enabled, the WordPress password you typed will be saved in local data. This might be disclosure in synchronize services.
publishModal_postDateTimeDesc: With format YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS
publishModal_wrongMatterDataForPage: There are tags or categories in matter-data which are not allowed for page. Are you sure to delete these data?
publishedModal_confirmEditInWP: Do you want to open WordPress edit page in browser?
profilesChooserModal_pickOne: Click to pick one profile to publish.
profileNotMatch_useNew: Create a new post using "<%= profileName %>"
settings_autoGenerateSlugDesc: Automatically generate URL slug from title when publishing
settings_tagFormatDesc: Choose how tags are stored in frontmatter
settings_tagFormatYAMLExample:
Example:
tags:
  - 鸡排
  - 牛肉
  - 美食
settings_slugGenerationModeDesc: Choose how to generate slug: Pinyin conversion or AI translation
settings_imageCropWidthDesc: Width in pixels for featured images and AI-generated images
settings_unsplashAccessKeyDesc: For searching and downloading Unsplash images
settings_imageAIProviderDesc: Select image generation AI service provider
notice_slugModeRequiresAI: ⚠️ AI translation mode requires Text Processing AI configuration. Switched back to Pinyin mode.
notice_imageAIConfigRequired: Please configure Image Generation AI first
notice_imageAIConfigValid: ✓ Image Generation AI configuration validated successfully
notice_imageAIConfigInvalid: ✗ Image Generation AI configuration validation failed: <%= error %>
publishModal_emptyContent: Article content is empty, cannot generate summary
publishModal_customPromptNotice: Customize the prompts used for AI-generated content here. Leave blank to use default prompts.
publishModal_unsplashKeyRequired: Please configure Unsplash API Key in plugin settings first
publishModal_imageAIRequired: Please configure AI service (Image Generation AI) in plugin settings first
publishModal_titleDesc: Title of the post or page. Slug will be auto-updated on Enter or blur
publishModal_slugDesc: URL alias, auto-updated with title or manually editable
publishModal_unsplashKeyRequiredSimple: Please configure Unsplash Access Key in plugin settings first
publishModal_aiServiceRequired: Please configure AI service in plugin settings first
publishModal_aiGeneratingImage: AI is generating image, please wait...
featuredImageModal_unsplashTooltip: Please configure Unsplash API Key in settings first
featuredImageModal_aiServiceRequired: Please configure AI service (Image Generation AI) in settings first
featuredImageModal_imageTooLarge: Image too large, will try to resize
featuredImageModal_imageCropped: Image cropped to <%= width %>x<%= height %>px (<%= ratio %>)
aiImageModal_descriptionDesc: Describe the image you want to generate
aiImageModal_descriptionRequired: Please enter or generate image description
conflictModal_description: Local frontmatter data conflicts with remote WordPress post data. Please choose how to resolve:
conflictModal_useLocalDesc: Keep local frontmatter value and overwrite remote data
conflictModal_useRemoteDesc: Use remote WordPress value and update local frontmatter
conflictModal_cancelDesc: Cancel this publish operation and resolve conflicts manually
notice_createCategoryFailed: Failed to create category "<%= name %>": <%= error %>
notice_duplicateFrontmatter: ⚠️ Duplicate fields in frontmatter: <%= fields %>, please check manually
error_categoriesCreationFailed: Failed to create categories: <%= names %>. Please create them manually in WordPress or choose existing categories.
error_noCategoriesAvailable: No categories available for publishing. Please select at least one category.
publishModal_publishAsNewDesc: Create a new post instead of updating existing one, allowing the same content to be published as different posts
publishModal_previewInconsistencyDesc: Your frontmatter has a featuredImageId but no featurePicture URL. The preview may not show the correct image. This will be automatically synced when you publish.
publishModal_advancedNotice: Customize AI prompts here. Leave empty to use default prompts.
publishModal_generatingImage: AI is generating image, please wait...
defaultPrompt_summary:
Please generate a concise summary of 100-200 words based on the following article content.
Requirements:
1. Summarize the core content and main points
2. Use fluent and natural language
3. Return only the summary text without any prefix or explanation

Article content:
{content}
defaultPrompt_tags:
Please extract 1-4 most relevant keywords as tags based on the following article content.
Requirements:
1. Each tag should be concise (2-4 words)
2. Separate tags with commas
3. Return only comma-separated tags without any prefix or explanation

Article content:
{content}
defaultPrompt_summaryEn:
Please generate a concise summary of 100-200 words based on the following article content.
Requirements:
1. Summarize the core content and main points
2. Use fluent and natural language
3. Return only the summary text without any prefix or explanation

Article content:
{content}
defaultPrompt_tagsEn:
Please extract 1-4 most relevant keywords as tags based on the following article content.
Requirements:
1. Each tag should be concise (2-4 words)
2. Separate tags with commas
3. Return only comma-separated tags without any prefix or explanation

Article content:
{content}
